description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a clean, boxy silhouette and a minimalist design. The upholstery is a smooth, solid white fabric that covers the entire frame, including the wide, straight armrests and the back panel. The sofa features two large seat cushions and two large backrest cushions, both of which are loose and plush, providing a comfortable seating experience. Five throw pillows in varying shades of white and beige are arranged symmetrically across the seat and back, adding visual interest and extra comfort. The legs are short, dark, and slightly recessed, making them barely visible from most angles. The overall appearance is contemporary and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, boxy white two-seater sofa with wide armrests, plush seat and back cushions, and five decorative throw pillows in white and beige. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with short, recessed legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, two large seat and back cushions, and five throw pillows arranged symmetrically.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the layered arrangement of the cushions and pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous back panel and the tops of the backrest cushions and pillows peeking over the edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the armrest profile and the arrangement of cushions and pillows from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two large, loose back cushions, with five smaller throw pillows (three in front, two behind) arranged symmetrically; all cushions are uniform in size and shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, and boxy armrests at each end, matching the height of the seat back and fully upholstered in the same white fabric; no decorative elements or contrast materials.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs, dark in color, positioned at the corners and slightly recessed, making them minimally visible; likely made of wood or metal.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions providing support; the backrest is continuous and unadorned, with no tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid white fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
